query: When is the 2026 NATO summit and Turkish Parliament TBMM summer recess 2026 schedule? Erdogan statements June 2026 on PKK legal framework timing.
answer:
I've completed the research on all three topics. Here's a concise summary of my findings:

## Summary

**1. 2026 NATO Summit**
- **NATO Leaders' Summit:** 7–8 July 2026 in **Ankara** (36th NATO summit, 2nd hosted by Türkiye). Confirmed by NATO's official site, Wikipedia, IAI, EPC, and Erdoğan's own remarks.
- A separate **NATO Parliamentary Assembly Summit** was held in **Istanbul on 28–29 June 2026** (27 delegations, 92 parliamentarians).

**2. TBMM Summer Recess 2026**
- The Assembly was **still in session as of 29 June 2026**, with a "critical week" starting 30 June (12th Judicial Package, Specialist NCO Law). Recess customarily begins around early July, but the **exact 2026 date was not stated** in available sources.
- Multiple bills were being rushed "before the summer recess."

**3. Erdoğan's June 2026 PKK Legal Framework Statements**
- On **24 June 2026**, Erdoğan announced a legal framework to accelerate PKK disarmament under "Terror-Free Türkiye," saying it would go to parliament "without delay."
- **Key timing mechanic:** AKP/MHP officials planned to submit the ~10–13 article bill **after the 7–8 July NATO summit**, aiming to pass it **before summer recess**.
- The law would take effect **only after verified PKK disarmament**, is **not a general amnesty**, and **excludes any change to Öcalan's prison status**.

**Critical uncertainty:** Reporting diverged on whether passage before recess is achievable — ranging from "could be enacted before recess" (Hürriyet Daily News) to "diminishing likelihood" (Türkiye Today) to possible slippage into the **October 2026** new legislative year (Evrensel). This is the central scheduling tension: the bill's planned submission *after* July 7–8 collides with an early-July recess window.

Full report, structured key facts, sources, and data points have been delivered via the StructuredOutput tool.

sources.title: 2026 Ankara NATO summit - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: The 2026 Ankara Summit is scheduled to be held in Ankara, Turkey, on 7–8 July 2026. It will be the 36th NATO summit and the second hosted by Turkey following the 2004 summit in Istanbul.

sources.title: Türkiye to host 2026 NATO Summit in Ankara | NATO News
sources.snippet: NATO announcement (20 Aug 2025) that Türkiye will host the 2026 NATO Summit in Ankara.

sources.title: Overview - 2026 NATO Summit in Ankara | NATO
sources.snippet: Official NATO event overview for the 2026 NATO Summit in Ankara, July 2026.

sources.title: Erdoğan says Turkey preparing legal framework to speed PKK's laying down of arms
sources.snippet: Erdoğan (24 June 2026) said government is preparing a legal framework to accelerate PKK disarmament, to be submitted to parliament 'without delay'; AKP/MHP discussing submission after the 7-8 July NATO summit to pass before summer recess.

sources.title: Parliament eyes bill on terror-free Türkiye process - Türkiye News
sources.snippet: Framework bill expected in July; may be presented to Speaker's Office after the NATO summit and could be enacted before the General Assembly enters recess; ~10-11 articles; operational only after PKK disarmament verified.

sources.title: Turkey's law on PKK peace limited to verifying giving up arms, no freedom yet for Öcalan
sources.snippet: Planned law expected narrow in scope, focused on verifying disarmament and managing returns, excluding any change in Öcalan's prison status.

sources.title: Türkiye's 'terror-free' law stalls as PKK disarmament remains unverified
sources.snippet: Likelihood of parliament passing the framework law before summer recess is diminishing; AK Party sources say PKK disarmament not confirmed/verified on the ground.

sources.title: 'Büyük barışı hep birlikte kuracağız' - Fatih Polat - Evrensel
sources.snippet: AKP framework law expected to be submitted to TBMM after Erdoğan's approval, following the NATO summit; legal steps for PKK reintegration may begin in earnest within four months, potentially October 2026 with the new legislative year.

sources.title: TBMM Genel Kurulu mesaisine başlıyor - Cumhuriyet
sources.snippet: TBMM begins weekly session 30 June 2026 with Specialist NCO Law amendment and 12th Judicial Package on agenda.

sources.title: AK Parti'den hobi bahçelerine neşter - Haber7
sources.snippet: AK Party MPs expect a 12-13 point legislative proposal on Terror-Free Turkey to be submitted to TBMM before the summer recess per Erdoğan's instructions, with the matter expected to mature by July.

sources.title: TBMM Başkanı Kurtulmuş NATO PA Summit remarks - Anadolu Ajansı
sources.snippet: Kurtulmuş: NATO PA Summit (28-29 June, Istanbul) had 27 delegations, 20 speakers, 92 parliamentarians; NATO Leaders' Summit to be led by Erdoğan in Ankara next week.

sources.title: Towards the Ankara NATO Summit & Southern Flank - IAI
sources.snippet: NATO Heads of State and Government Summit scheduled in Ankara on 7-8 July 2026, coinciding with the 74th anniversary of Türkiye's NATO membership.

sources.title: Erdogan Legal Framework to Expedite PKK Disbandment - Daily Beirut
sources.snippet: Erdogan (Reuters) reveals legal framework to accelerate PKK disbandment with swift parliamentary consideration expected.
